name: Cloth travel bag
description:
The Herbag Zip Retourne Cabine is a travel bag large enough for a carry-on, made from Hermès' signature Toile Militaire canvas with Vache Hunter cowhide leather trim, and finished with the Clou de Selle clasp that links it to the house's equestrian heritage.

The color palette combines Deep Blue Toile Militaire canvas with Bleu Indigo Vache Hunter leather — a tonal combination that feels considered rather than neutral, with enough versatility to suit various travel contexts without the maintenance demands of lighter canvas options.


Features:
Laptop compartment
Phone and key pocket
Removable zipped interior pouch
Zipped rear exterior pocket
Foldable top handle
Adjustable shoulder strap — for hand or shoulder carry
Condition:
Lightly used for travel. Clean trim, with minor marks and scratches to leather. Stored in its dust bag.
Accompanied by:
Hermès dust bag, padlock, keys, clochette, removable interior pouch, and original Paris receipt. All accessories in excellent condition.
